article_title: GitHub Copilot 的编码套件：VS Code 里 AI 真正在做什么
core_theme: VS Code 的 coding harness 是连接语言模型与编辑器动作的系统层，负责上下文组装、工具暴露和工具执行，驱动 agent 循环
reader_takeaway: 理解模型只生成文本，套件才是让文本变成实际操作的那层；以及 VS Code 如何评测和适配不同模型
summary_angle: 模型是发动机，套件才是整辆车——这张封面展示套件如何把模型输出变成真实编辑器动作

information_blocks.source_anchor: Context assembly, Tool exposure, Tool execution — the three main responsibilities of the coding harness
information_blocks.visual_idea: 三个模块化节点围绕中心主体排列，标注编号

information_blocks.source_anchor: Language models do not edit files, execute commands, or run tests by themselves. They can only produce text.
information_blocks.visual_idea: 模型作为中心发光体，只输出文字流；套件作为环绕层将文字转化为动作箭头

information_blocks.source_anchor: think → act → observe → think again cycle — the agent loop
information_blocks.visual_idea: 循环箭头或螺旋轨迹，表达迭代推进感

information_blocks.source_anchor: 40 VSC-Bench runs across eight model-effort configurations
information_blocks.visual_idea: 右侧角落小型散点图剪影或数字标注，表示评测维度

main_metaphor: 汽车发动机与车身的关系：模型是发动机，harness 是整辆车
primary_subject: VS Code 编辑器窗口外壳作为主体，内部流动着上下文→工具→动作的信息流
subject_action: 编辑器窗口作为套件容器，向语言模型发送请求，接收文本并转换为代码编辑动作
composition: 等距空间或层级式关系
selected_style_prompt_descriptor: game concept art illustration, clear hero object, readable environment storytelling, polished lighting, production-art detail
selected_style_reason: 从40项风格池中随机选中第35项；游戏原画风擅长展示模块化系统关系，清晰的英雄主体加辅助环境叙事，适合架构型文章
style_safety_note: 游戏原画风为通用视觉风格描述，不指向特定游戏品牌、工作室或艺术家，无需额外安全改写
avoid: 伪造的 VS Code 界面截图
draft_goal: 先验证：等距三层架构（上下文→模型→动作）+ 循环箭头 + 游戏原画质感是否成立
revision_targets: 如果模型主体不够突出，加强中心发光效果
如果信息块太密，压缩为2个可见标签
如果出现假界面元素，改为抽象几何形式
final_prompt: Wide cover illustration, aspect ratio 2.35:1. Game concept art illustration, clear hero object, readable environment storytelling, polished lighting, production-art detail. Isometric conceptual systems scene. Deep navy background #1A2D4F. Central glowing language model core (abstract luminous sphere or crystal) surrounded by three orbital modules labeled with small Chinese chips: '上下文' '套件' '循环'. A stylized VS Code-inspired editor window frame (isometric, abstracted, not a real UI screenshot) acting as the harness container that transforms text output into code edit actions. Flowing amber #E87B2F information streams connecting model core to action arrows. Small '40' numeric chip in corner representing 40 VSC-Bench evaluation runs. Strong focal contrast, polished game-art lighting, no fake UI, no dashboard, no chart axes, no terminal output, no English slogans, no watermarks. Wide cinematic composition.
